summary: Competitive Quoting System testing complete. All 16 backend API tests pass. UI testing verified: VendorOps dashboard, Price Requests tab with 4 sub-tabs, New Request form, 3-column detail view, vendor selection, quote submission, and quote comparison. Fixed 2 bugs: vendor list query (partner_type field) and vendor ID serialization (_id to id).

minor.issue: FIXED - Was querying 'type' field but partners use 'partner_type'. Updated query to check both fields.
FIXED - Vendors missing 'id' field. Added serialization to convert MongoDB _id to id string.
FIXED - Vendor lookup by id was failing. Added ObjectId fallback lookup.

issues: Vendor names show as 'Unknown' when first sent - this is because the vendor lookup was failing (now fixed in backend)

critical_code_review_comments: React key warning in ProductsTab - 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' - non-critical but should be fixed
Vendor count shows 0 in KPI strip even though vendors exist - the dashboard-stats endpoint counts partners with type='vendor/supplier/manufacturer' but partners have partner_type field
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ price requests during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Competitive Quoting System fully tested. Key features verified: 1) POST /api/vendor-ops/price-requests creates request with auto-sourcing mode from settings. 2) GET with tab=new/awaiting/ready/closed filters correctly. 3) GET /stats returns new, awaiting, ready, overdue counts. 4) POST /send-to-vendors sends to selected vendors, sets status to sent_to_vendors. 5) POST /submit-quote adds vendor quote, sets status to partially_quoted. 6) POST /select-vendor selects winner, applies 20% margin, sets final_sell_price, status to ready_for_sales. 7) UI shows 3-column layout: Summary, Vendor Selection, Quote Comparison. 8) BEST PRICE badge shown on lowest quote. 9) Settings Hub has Sourcing Strategy tab under Catalog with mode, max vendors, quote expiry, lead time settings.

backend_apis.POST /api/vendor-ops/price-requests: PASS - Creates request with auto-sourcing mode
backend_apis.GET /api/vendor-ops/price-requests/stats: PASS - Returns new, awaiting, ready, overdue counts
backend_apis.GET /api/vendor-ops/price-requests/{id}: PASS - Returns full detail with vendor_quotes array
backend_apis.POST /api/vendor-ops/price-requests/{id}: PASS - Sends to vendors, sets status
backend_apis.GET /api/vendor-ops/vendors: PASS - Returns vendors with id field

frontend_ui.vendor_ops_page: PASS - Shows KPI strip with stats
frontend_ui.price_requests_tab: PASS - Shows 4 sub-tabs: New, Awaiting Quotes, Ready for Sales, Closed
frontend_ui.new_request_form: PASS - Shows product, category, quantity, unit fields
frontend_ui.request_detail_view: PASS - Shows 3-column layout: Summary, Vendor Selection, Quote Comparison
frontend_ui.vendor_selection: PASS - Shows checkboxes for vendors with Send button
frontend_ui.quote_comparison: PASS - Shows vendor cards with base price, BEST PRICE badge, Select button
frontend_ui.quote_entry_form: PASS - Shows vendor dropdown, price, lead time, notes fields

settings_hub.sourcing_strategy_tab: PASS - Tab exists under Catalog section
settings_hub.vendor_ops_settings: PASS - Shows default sourcing mode, max vendors, quote expiry, lead time

bugs_fixed.issue: Vendor list query was looking for 'type' field but partners use 'partner_type'
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated query to check both 'type' and 'partner_type' fields
Added serialization to convert MongoDB _id to id string

bugs_fixed.issue: Vendor lookup in send-to-vendors was failing
bugs_fixed.fix: Added ObjectId fallback lookup for vendor by _id
